entries.definition:
kh–r–ṭ–m nose, trunk (of an elephant), to hit on the nose, to bottle up one’s anger; notables. Of this root, خُرْطُوم khurṭūm occurs once in the Qur’an.
خُرْطُوم khurṭūm [n.] nose, snout (also said to mean face, in general) (68:16) سَنَسِمُهُ عَلَى الْخُرْطُومِ We will brand him on the snout!

خُرْطُوم khurṭūm [n.] nose, snout (also said to mean face, in general) (68:16) سَنَسِمُهُ عَلَى الْخُرْطُومِ We will brand him on the snout!
